episodes.title: Growing up in a Fundamentalist Christian Cult, Beatings & Quiverfull Teachings Ft Jo Beth
episodes.description: New York creative & Jo Beth shares her journey of growing up in a fundamentalist Christian environment untangling control, trauma &  perfectionism. Living with ADHD & a dysregulated nervous system, she speaks openly about rebuilding a life & career while still healing. This episode is about creative reclamation, authenticity &  rising while putting the pieces back together.
